beats.what: A person's fingers are typing on a laptop keyboard.
Close-up of hands moving across the laptop keys.
Fingers press down on specific keys of the laptop.
Hands continue typing rapidly on the silver keyboard.

formal.text: Fingers engage with a laptop keyboard.
Rapid typing continues on the silver keyboard.

sarcastic.text: I'm on the edge of my seat.

humorous_tech.text: Attempting to brute-force the production password.
Latency is high. The hardware is struggling.
Wait, I think I just triggered a race condition.
Still typing. Still hoping for no merge conflicts.

humorous_non_tech.text: Writing a very important letter to my cat.
He really needs to know about the empty bowl.
The drama is building with every single tap.
And now, the grand finale of my masterpiece!
